_comment: Reference audiocore server config. Edit the `path` fields to point at your weights/ tree. The webapp (Voice Studio) is embedded in the binary at '/' when built with -DENGINE_BUILD_WEBAPP=ON (default). Launch with: build/bin/audiocore_server --config examples/server.json — or use scripts/run_webapp.sh to auto-discover and skip this file entirely.
_clips_dir_comment: Where generated audio + uploads live. Empty = '<exe-dir>/clips'. The webapp's Voices and Clips tabs read from here.
_models_comment: Only ONE model per family is loaded eagerly at boot to bound VRAM; the rest register as 'load on demand' and the webapp's Models tab swaps them. Families currently ship 4 variants: ace_step (music), qwen3_tts (speech + voice design), moss_tts (speech), moss_sfx_v2 (sound effects).

models._comment: ACE-Step turbo — fastest music model (8-step flow-matching). Modes: text_to_music (default), cover, repaint, completion.
ACE-Step turbo + ScragVAE — same turbo DiT but with the ScragVAE decoder (preserves 12-24 kHz highs that the stock VAE rolls off).
ACE-Step base — full quality 50-step model. Register alongside turbo; the Models tab swaps them.
ACE-Step SFT — supervised fine-tune of base (50-step, better caption adherence).
ACE-Step XL Turbo — 4B LM + XL DiT (8-step, higher quality, more VRAM).
Qwen3-TTS 1.7B CustomVoice — text-to-speech + zero-shot voice cloning from a .voice embedding.
Qwen3-TTS 1.7B VoiceDesign — natural-language voice description → unique speaker embedding. Used by the Voice Design tab.
MOSS-SoundEffect-v2 — text → sound effects (1.3B DiT + DAC VAE + Qwen3 text encoder). SFX tab.

_endpoints: POST /v1/models/load    {id}           — hot-load a deferred model into VRAM
